contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Rename 真视道 → 真观道 in published 'Where 道 Integrates with DAO' post
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/60
  
  Details:
  # Rename: 真视道 → 真观道 in published blog post
  
  Small follow-up to the parent submission (PR #59 — "Where 道 Integrates
  with DAO" blog post on truesight.me). After publish, decided 真观道 is
  the more accurate Chinese name for the project than 真视道:
  
  - **观 vs 视:** 观 (behold / contemplate / observe with depth) matches
    what the project actually does in its 道 ledger — throwing I Ching
    casts at oracle.truesight.me, holding the "wait till settle" cadence,
    reading QMDJ charts — better than 视 (active visual perception).
  - **Structural rhyme:** A Daoist temple is 道观 ("Dao-observatory").
    真观道 reads as "the true Dao-observatory" — exactly what the parent
    post argued the project is.
  - **Tonal flow:** zhēn-guān-dào (1-1-4) sings; zhēn-shì-dào (1-4-4)
    clips.
  
  ## Edits
  
  - `blog/posts/where-dao-integrates-with-dao.html` — H2 + 5 inline refs;
    pinyin gloss (zhēn shì dào → zhēn guān dào); character gloss
    (视 (seeing) → 观 (behold)); tagline ("the way of true seeing" →
    "the way of true beholding"); body line ("when 真观 has to operate
    at distance")
  - `blog/index.html` — excerpt (1 ref)
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/60 (merged)
  
  ## Generated by
  
  Claude Opus 4.7 (Anthropic) via Claude Code, in conversation with
  Gary Teh.
